zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Harding於1448年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Roger Harding25歲，母親Elizabeth Del'outhe18歲。他於1465年與Margaret Oswald在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年5月30日在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安享年84歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Harding was born in 1448, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Roger Harding, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Del'outhe, was 18. He married Margaret Oswald in 1465, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 30 May 1532, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Harding est né en 1448, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Harding, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Del'outhe, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Oswald en 1465, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 mai 1532, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hardingが1448年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Roger Hardingは25歳，母Elizabeth Del'outheは18歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでMargaret Oswaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1532年5月30日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで84歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Harding(이)가 1448년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Harding(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Del'outhe(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 Margaret Oswald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 5월 30일 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Harding родился в 1448 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Harding было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Del'outhe, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Oswald в 1465 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 мая 1532 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия.
